programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Shepherds Around The World
programme.desc: People Mark Michel and his team embark on a global journey, immersing themselves in the lives of five diverse pastoral communities to explore their unique cultures, challenges, and enduring traditions.

programme.title: Four Seasons In The Forests
programme.desc: Nature Different creatures interact with nature; some appear and others hide each season, providing variety in the forest.

programme.title: The Battle For Survival In The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Nature Despite the dangers and threats to which marine creatures are exposed daily in the Mediterranean Sea due to factory and farm waste, these creatures struggle to survive through adaptation and biological evolution.

programme.title: In Love With Wild Horses
programme.desc: People An amazing journey through the enchanting nature of the North American continent, home to the Tsoulcotine people, known as the horse people because of their timeless and unique bond with horses.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: Arabic Radio
programme.desc: History Delving into the history of Arab radio, highlighting its role in conveying the voice of the people, shaping their consciousness, and expressing their revolutions and demands. It also presents the role of radio in communication and preserving the heritage and art of the diverse Arab peoples.

programme.title: The Diabetes Battle In Australia
programme.desc: Fitness & Health An Australian physician and a physiologist are revolutionizing the world of diseases by presenting a scientifically based diet that can eliminate type 2 diabetes.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Modern Science
programme.desc: Sciences Despite the progressive scientific developments in many fields, science remains baffled by unexpected cosmic phenomena such as solar storms. Research into many mysteries continues, but science must be prepared to deal with the discoveries' consequences.

programme.title: Protecting Sondong Cave
programme.desc: Nature A journey into the heart of Phong Nha-Ke Bang cave, located in northern Vietnam and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This cave, the largest in the world, is an extraordinary marvel, featuring a lake, forest, clouds, and a rare ecosystem.

programme.title: Secrets Of Mount Olympus
programme.desc: Nature An exciting and enjoyable exploratory adventure in one of the strangest places in the world: Mount Olympus, once the home of the gods in Greek mythology. Now, scientists are working tirelessly to understand its strange phenomena.

programme.title: Santorini's Mystery
programme.desc: Nature Researchers from around the globe embark on a high-stakes mission to investigate the volatile volcano of Santorini, plunging beneath the sea to gather evidence and unravel questions that have intrigued historians and scientists for decades.

programme.title: Cheese From The Heart Of Nature
programme.desc: Nature Cheese makers strive to preserve the traditional flavor threatened by modern industry, passing down their age-old secrets through generations, believing that authentic taste is crafted by patient, loving hands, not machines.

programme.title: A Mosque's Story

programme.title: The One I Loved
programme.desc: Erkan, who comes from a wealthy background, is assigned to complete his military service in a remote earthquake-prone town, where he meets Dicle. They get married, and he brings her from her modest world into his life in the capital. Helin Kandemir, Aytac Sasmaz.

programme.title: Abdel Ghani's Daughters
programme.desc: Three sisters team up to stop their older sister's forced wedding, but each of their plans fails, exposing family conflicts and the social pressures tied to marriage within the household. Abdullah Al Turkmany, Maram Al Bloushi.

programme.title: Our Club
programme.desc: Debate An interactive space where fans share their passion for Saudi football by discussing league matches, talking about their favorite clubs, and exploring the history and meaning of championships. Abd Al Rahman Al Hamidy, Abd Al Rahman Al Hamidy.

programme.title: Good Morning Arabs
programme.desc: A diverse group of media professionals present the latest developments in major events worldwide and focus on family concerns such as health, beauty, and social affairs. programme.title: Crazy About You
programme.desc: In a moment of emotional vulnerability and following an unexpected reunion with her former lover, a respected lawyer chooses to leave her current life behind, inspired by her longing to revive the love she never truly let go of. Mariam El Khosht, Amir El Masry.

programme.title: The Traitor
programme.desc: After discovering her husband's affair with a woman fifteen years younger, Aseel's perfect world shatters. She abandons her calm facade and transforms from a successful doctor into a woman consumed by vengeance. Sulafa Memar, Qays Sheikh Najib.

programme.title: The Traitor

programme.title: Confusion
programme.desc: A young man confronts his family and tries to overcome the problems caused by his dominant father to marry the woman he loves. Alexander Uloom, Zahraa Ben Meem.

programme.title: Wild Heart
programme.desc: Kidnapped from his wealthy family as a child, Yaman grows up on the streets, forming close bonds along the way. Years later, he's reunited with his biological family but struggles to adjust to a life of privilege he no longer remembers. Halit Ozgur Sari, Simay Barlas.

programme.title: Roses And Sins
programme.desc: Serhat, a self-made man who rose from nothing, watches his stability collapse when his wife slips into a coma and he discovers a dark secret about her. In his search for answers, he crosses paths with Zeynep, a florist pursuing the same truth. Murat Yildirim, Cemre Baysel.

programme.title: Love Lobby
programme.desc: Disorder surrounds the hotel run by Rostom, a man obsessed with precision, as his orderly world clashes with his unruly guests, led by Shams, a fiercely independent woman who refuses marriage. Pamela El kik, Moatasem Al Nahar.

programme.title: Till Death
programme.desc: Shedding the light on many curses of current age such as greed and abuse of power through many thrilling episodes. 588 Maguy Bou Ghosn, Mohammad Al Ahmad, Daniella Rahma, Bassem Moughnieh, Khaled Al Qeesh, Nadine Jaber, Philip Asmar.

programme.title: Leyla
programme.desc: A woman, named Leyla scorned by her stepmother, returns to seek vengeance but finds herself entangled in a web of love and forgiveness, challenging her desire for revenge. Cemre Baysel, Alperen Duymaz, Gonca Vuslateri, Yigit Kirazci, Halil Ibrahim Ceyhan, Hilal Saral, Nuket Bicakci.

programme.title: Qarib Qarib Singlle
programme.desc: Two different people meet on dating apps on the internet, but they affect each other's lives and help in discovering their hidden personalities. Irrfan Khan, Parvathy Thiruvothu, Isha Sharvani, Neha Dhupia, Bajrangbali Singh, Tanuja Chandra, Kamna Chandra.

programme.title: Aaj Ka Arjun
programme.desc: Ajit and his father are really wealthy landlords, and when he fell in love and got married to Bhim's sister, his family refused to accept her and things go upside down. Amitabh Bachchan, Jaya Prada, Raadhika Sarathkumar, Suresh Oberoi, Kiran Kumar, K.C. Bokadia, Santosh Saroj, P. Vasu.

programme.title: Rowdy Rakshak
programme.desc: After the Indian prime minister's assassination, his special agent is assigned to search for and arrest the criminal. Suriya , Arya , Mohanlal , Sayyeshaa Saigal, Boman Irani, K.V. Anand, Pattukottai Prabhakar, K.V. Anand, Suriya.

programme.title: Funeral Works
programme.desc: A young man who works to bury the unidentified dead, his friend asks him to bury a corpse in exchange for money. The young man agrees to be able to marry his beloved, but his life is turned upside down when he discovers that the body is still alive. Melih Selcuk, Cemre Melis Çinar, Caner Atacan, Bedia Ener, Aydan Burhan, Korhan Ugur, Korhan Ugur.

programme.title: Crook
programme.desc: A DVD seller was sent to Australia for work purpose. At the airport he met his host who was waiting for another guest. But this DVD seller pretended to be her supposed guest. Emraan Hashmi, Neha Sharma, Arjan Bajwa, Kavin Dave, Smiley Suri, Mohit Suri, Mohit Suri.

programme.title: Moonless
programme.desc: When a young man returns to his ancestral mansion with his fiancée before their wedding, he becomes possessed by his murdered friend's vengeful spirit and must fight the deadly force threatening to destroy them all. Nargis Fakhri, Sachiin Joshi, Vivan Bhatena, Navneet Kaur Dhillon, Ali Asgar, Bhushan Patel, Aparna Nadig.

programme.title: My Fat Wife
programme.desc: An overweight girl gets used to the constant rejection of the opposite sex because of her outward appearance, but when her path crosses with a wrestling superstar, she realizes that love knows no law. Rytasha Rathore, Prince Narula.

programme.title: When We Met
programme.desc: Two old friends dream of marrying their children from each other whom love knows its way to them, but circumstances separate them and the beloved seeks revenge. Muzammil Desai.

programme.title: Judgementall Hai Kya
programme.desc: Bobby is a woman who rents part of her apartment to a couple. When a lot of strange situations happen between them, she starts to worry and suspicious because of their weird behavior. Kangana Ranaut, Rajkummar Rao, Amyra Dastur, Amrita Puri, Jimmy Shergill, Prakash Kovelamudi, Kanika Dhillon.

programme.title: Our Story
programme.desc: A true love between different couples from 1910, 1960 and , showing that the time is different, but the act of love is the same. Shahid Kapoor, Priyanka Chopra, Prachi Desai, Neha Sharma, Omar Khan, Kunal Kohli, Kunal Kohli.

programme.title: Moonless
programme.desc: When a young man returns to his ancestral mansion with his fiancée before their wedding, he becomes possessed by his murdered friend's vengeful spirit and must fight the deadly force threatening to destroy them all. Nargis Fakhri, Sachiin Joshi, Vivan Bhatena, Navneet Kaur Dhillon, Ali Asgar, Bhushan Patel, Aparna Nadig.

programme.title: Love
programme.desc: Life has not been fair to Prithvi since his childhood till his youth resulting in separation between him and the only one he loved. Suresh Krishna, Salman Khan, Rita Bhaduri.

programme.desc: Gunjan Saxena seeks to be a pilot as she has a passion for flying. Janhvi Kapoor, Pankaj Tripathi, Angad Bedi, Manav Vij, Ayesha Raza Mishra, Ali Khan AK, Nikhil Mehrotra.

programme.title: Aatma: Feel It Around You
programme.desc: After a single mother starts her new life with her six years old daughter, strange and scary things start to attack them, so the mother must fight to keep herself and her daughter safe. Bipasha Basu, Doyel Dhawan, Jaideep Ahlawat, Padam Bhola, Nawazuddin Siddiqui, Suparn Verma, Suparn Verma.

programme.title: One Last Sin
programme.desc: In a daring and treacherous quest, Hisham gambles everything to locate his vanished sister by going undercover in a ruthless drug cartel. However, the events that follow defy all anticipation, altering the course of everyone's lives forever. Samer Ismail, Ammar Shalaq.

programme.desc: Meera is a free-spirited woman who rejects the pressure of traditional marriage. Her life changes when she meets Vivaan, a wealthy businessman searching for his family in India. Arjit Taneja, Aditi Sharma.
